compiled_state.title: Implement pre-commit test quality gate hook with tool selection and graceful degradation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create the main pre-commit hook that detects test anti-patterns.

### Steps
1. Create plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh
2. Tool selection: read test_quality.tool from dso-config.conf (semgrep|bash-grep|disabled)
3. Semgrep path: run semgrep --config=semgrep-rules/test-anti-patterns.yaml on staged test files
4. Bash-grep fallback: grep for high-confidence patterns (cat/grep source in tests, os.path.exists as sole assertion)
5. Graceful degradation: if selected tool not installed, emit WARNING and exit 0
6. Timeout budget: use existing pre-commit-wrapper.sh timeout pattern
7. Only run on staged files matching test patterns (tests/**)
8. chmod +x the hook file

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh — Create
- .test-index — Edit (remove RED marker from T1)

## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Hook file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh
- [ ] Hook gracefully degrades when Semgrep not available
  Verify: TEST_QUALITY_TOOL=semgrep bash plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -qi "warning\|skipping\|not found\|degraded"

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh, pre-commit-test-gate.sh, test-anti-patterns.yaml, assert.sh, dso-config.conf, .test-index; exemplars read: pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh, pre-commit-test-gate.sh) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: pre-commit-test-quality-gate.sh. Tests: 4/4 pass (all GREEN).
